# Native SQLite Instructions

## DO

## DON'T
- Create/edit `.table.dart` files manually
- Edit generated files
- Create md files after each prompt 
- create backwards compatibility files codes or methods 


## File Naming
- Models: `snake_case.dart`
- Generated: `*.table.dart` (auto-generated)
- Manager: `database_schema.database_manager.g.dart` (auto-generated, in .gitignore)
